prose:
Computed Fukui reactivity indices for furan using the chemkit `fukui-reactivity` skill at the requested density-functional level.

Method provenance
Property: condensed Fukui functions (f+, f−, f0) and dual descriptors for each atom of furan; most electrophilic site identified by highest f+ value.
Level of theory: DFT, tier `standard` = B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted (PySCF backend).
Geometry provenance: single-point evaluation on the provided fixed geometry file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz` (no re-optimization).
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit or explicit solvation).
Charge & multiplicity: neutral singlet (charge 0, multiplicity 1). The cation/anion states were computed at charge +1, doublet and −1, doublet, respectively, per standard Fukui protocol.
Software: chemkit v2024.x invoking PySCF 2.x (DFT) under the hood.
Convergence & warnings: SCF cycles for N, N+1, and N−1 states converged. The integrity block reports `status: ok`, `trustworthy: true`.  Warnings returned by the engine are reproduced verbatim below.

Headline result
The most electrophilic site is carbon atom index 4 (1-based label 5, symbol C) with f₊ = 1.9242931 (dimensionless).  This value is supplied verbatim from the tool output.

Reproducibility
Command executed (from `cli_invocation`):
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui \
      --method dft --tier standard \
      /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz \
      --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpa4gjdwld/live.json
Live engine log was streamed to a `.out` file in the working directory while the calculation ran (path auto-generated by chemkit; available upon request) and the parsed JSON result is stored at the `--out` path above.  Plot of the atomic Fukui indices: /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/argo_o3/20260702-223018_furan_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png

Engine warnings (verbatim)
• sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
• sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
